elections.note: Certified final 589,611 ballots cast (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Stats by County: polls 306,324 + VBM 283,287; 69.24% of 851,581 registered). Pre-adoption (precinct-based; e-pollbooks not until 2020). Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: San Bernardino's 2012 live results lived in a JS-iframe results page (www.sbcounty.gov/rov/elections/Results/20121106/content/results.aspx) whose dynamic iframe content was never archived at an election-night timestamp. The only Wayback artifacts for 2012 are static help pages re-crawled June 2023 on results.rov.sbcounty.gov -- content/electionNightTotals.html (just an EXPLANATION of 'precincts reporting', no totals) and content/resultsTimeline.html (just the posting SCHEDULE: 8:15pm pre-Election-Day mail, 10pm Election-Day mail + nearby polls, Wed 12am+ every 2hrs precincts, Thu mail picked up at polls) -- neither carries a ballot count. No clean end-of-night county ballot total found. Null per definition (never substitute a different denominator). snapshot none used. [2026-06 re-check per updated methodology: San Bernardino ROV issues NO morning-after 'semi-final/semi-official results' ballot-count press release -- its full news archive (elections.sbcounty.gov/news/, years 2011-2026) lists only public notices, L&A certifications and certification-of-results, never a stated election-night ballot total; and no downloadable election-night report PDF/XLSX existed pre-2019 (the results.aspx frameset carried no summary file). Earliest results.aspx Wayback capture is 2015-09-29 (years post-election). Remains none.]

CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('FENU'-coded row), San Bernardino County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 231,219, Last Report stamp 'Nov 5 1:50 a.m.' (First Report 'Nov 4 8:09 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20141105141649 (2014-11-05 14:16:49 UTC). SINGLE CAPTURE at 2014-11-05 14:16:49 UTC carries this value. The next available capture (2014-11-07 08:38:01 UTC) jumps to 270,882 (Last Report 'Nov 6 4:07 p.m.'), confirming 231,219 was election night's last state before the canvass moved (non-circular bracket leg per RUNBOOK 8). NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 293,283 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2014-general/pdf/03-voter-particpiation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 231,219/293,283 = 78.84%. vs_epollbook=pre, vs_asv=pre (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2020, asv 2025). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2014-11-04 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

Certified final 546,041 ballots cast (CA SoS; polls 209,168 + VBM 336,873; 58.26% of 937,316 registered). Pre-adoption, precinct-based (LAST midterm before e-pollbooks in 2020). Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable: the live iframe results page (sbcounty.gov/rov/elections/results/20181106/content/results.aspx) has no election-night capture; the only archived rendering is a POST-CANVASS capture from Mon Nov 12, 2018 00:42 PST (6 days after Election Day) showing Precinct Turnout 168,820 + VBM 196,263 = 365,083 -- a partial-canvass total (66.9% of the 546,041 certified), neither the election-night plateau nor the final. The frameset default.html was captured Sat Nov 10; rendering it pulls the same Nov-12 canvass data. No Election-Night capture exists. Null per definition. snapshot 20181112084232 (post-canvass, not usable). [2026-06 re-check per updated methodology: no pre-2019 downloadable election-night report PDF/XLSX exists (the live 2018 frameset results.rov.sbcounty.gov/results/20181106/default.html renders only content/results.aspx, with no summary-report file to download), and San Bernardino ROV issues no morning-after 'semi-final results' ballot-count press release (full news archive 2011-2026 = public notices/certifications only); earliest results.aspx capture remains Mon Nov 12 (post-canvass). Remains null.]

Certified final 458,946 ballots cast (CA SoS; polls 66,469 + VBM 392,477; 40.30% of 1,138,818 registered). Post-epollbook (KNOWiNK PollPad from 2020), pre-ASV. Election-night PLATEAU not sourceable despite knowing its exact posting time: San Bernardino's archived 2022 Results Posting Schedule (sbcountyelections.com/Elections/2022/1108/ResultSchedule/, capture 20221118191058) shows the 'Posting of Final Unofficial Election Night Results' was at 9:40 a.m. Wed Nov 9, 2022, with the canvass resuming at the 4 p.m. Wed posting. But Wayback never captured the live results page (sbcountyelections.com/elections/2022/1108/results/, which embeds results.rov.sbcounty.gov/Results/20221108/) in the 9:40am-4pm Wed window. The only night capture is the 4:00 a.m. Wed INTERMEDIATE posting (capture 20221109134003 = Wed 05:40 PST), which the page itself labels '4:00 a.m. Posting of Unofficial Election Night Results' and shows Voters Cast 177,481 of 1,138,702 at only 1,365 of 2,765 precincts (49.37%) -- a mid-count undercount (38.7% of certified), NOT the plateau. Surrounding captures are pre-poll-close (Tue 18:34) and post-canvass (Nov 27). No clean 9:40am plateau total recoverable. Null per definition (the 4 a.m. figure is the classic first-tranche/mid-count trap; not substituted). snapshot 20221109134003 (4 a.m. intermediate, not the plateau). [2026-06 re-check, report-file + press-release routes per updated methodology: the page's downloadable ElectionSummaryReportRPT.pdf was NEVER archived (CDX = 0 captures), and the corresponding .xlsx was captured only pre-poll-close (Tue Nov 8 13:03 PST, near-zero/template) and post-canvass (Thu Nov 10 22:06 PST) -- never the Wed Nov 9 9:40 a.m. plateau window; a prefix CDX of all results.rov.sbcounty.gov/Results/20221108 captures dated Wed Nov 9 returns ONLY the single 05:40 PST '4 a.m. posting' page (Voters Cast 177,481 of 1,138,702, 15.59% of registered -- confirmed from the raw 1.9 MB archived HTML). San Bernardino ROV also issues no morning-after 'semi-final results' ballot-count press release (full news archive 2011-2026 = public notices/certifications only). Remains null.]

CA SoS per-county reporting-status page ('SF'-coded row), San Bernardino County: 100.0% precincts reporting, Ballots Cast 150,018, Last Report stamp 'Mar 6 1:48 a.m.' (First Report 'Mar 5 8:20 p.m.') at Wayback capture 20240306144409 (2024-03-06 14:44:09 UTC). FROZEN: the identical Ballots Cast figure 150,018 recurs across 2 captures, 2024-03-06 14:44:09 UTC through 2024-03-06 18:05:49 UTC, before the next available capture (2024-03-07 03:52:36 UTC) jumps to 160,881 (Last Report 'Mar 6 3:48 p.m.'), marking the canvass resuming. NOT the pre-plateau first-tranche row (page's own early-evening captures, <99% precincts reporting, were excluded per RUNBOOK 1 and the grading discipline in scratchpad sos-status-sweep.md). Certified final 305,853 Total Voters (CA SoS Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County, https://elections.cdn.sos.ca.gov/sov/2024-primary/sov/03-voter-participation-stats-by-county.pdf). Arithmetic: 150,018/305,853 = 49.05%. vs_epollbook=post, vs_asv=pre (per county_tech/adoption record: epollbook 2020, asv 2025). Grade CONFIRMED per RUNBOOK 8. Sourced from the 2026-07 CA SoS status-page sweep across the 19-county panel (scratchpad/sos-status-sweep.md, 2024-03-05 section); the cited capture and freeze/jump evidence above were independently re-derived here by matching this exact Ballots Cast figure against the raw per-capture status-page timeline (script scratchpad/build_cell_details.py), not merely transcribed from the sweep's prose summary.

Election-night PLATEAU = 434,108 ballots ('Voters Cast: 434,108 of 1,198,556', 36.22% of registered) at Precincts Reported 2,872 of 2,872 (100.00%), from San Bernardino's OFFICIAL Clarity-style results page whose header reads literally 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' with 'Next Update: November 6, 2024 4:00 p.m.' -- recovered from Wayback capture 20241106224114 (Wed Nov 6, 2024 2:41 PM PST). The county's archived Results Posting Schedule (Elections/2024/1105/ResultSchedule/, capture 20241106231234) pins the '10 a.m. - Posting of Final Unofficial Election Night Results' (Wed Nov 6) as the last election-night posting, with the canvass resuming at the 'Next update - Wednesday, November 6, 2024, 4 p.m.' posting -- so this 2:41 PM capture sits squarely on the plateau, between the 10 a.m. final-EN posting and the 4 p.m. canvass resume. Composition confirms pre-canvass: Mail 299,226 + Designated Mail 1,028 + Polling Place 133,854 + Provisional 0 = 434,108 (provisionals not yet processed). The corroborating downloadable ElectionSummaryReportRPT.pdf on results.rov.sbcounty.gov, crawled earlier at Nov 6 09:28 PST, shows a still-rising intermediate (417,655 at 58.67% precincts) -- so 434,108 is the higher, settled 100%-precinct plateau, not an undercount. 434,108 / 771,834 certified = 56.24% (matches SF's ~57% calibration for 2024). Post-epollbook (2020), pre-ASV (2025). snapshot 20241106224114 used. Numerator render-verified from the archived JS results page (puppeteer; see render_verified.json).

notes: Definition: election-night % = ballots in San Bernardino County's LAST election-night report -- the 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' posting (the cumulative 'Voters Cast' total at 100% of precincts that plateaus and holds the day after Election Day, before the next-scheduled afternoon posting resumes the multi-day canvass) -- divided by CA SoS certified final ballots cast (Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics by County). Covers the November generals 2012, 2014, 2016, 2018, 2022, 2024 that bracket San Bernardino's 2020 adoption of electronic pollbooks (KNOWiNK PollPad, first used March 2020) and its 2025 adoption of Automatic Signature Verification (ASV, first used Nov 2025 special); the 2020 general is deliberately EXCLUDED as a COVID early-voting outlier. ADOPTION: e-pollbook 2020 -> 2012/2014/2016/2018 are PRE, 2022/2024 POST; ASV 2025 -> all six are PRE. DENOMINATORS are PRIMARY and solid for all six (CA SoS SOV participation tables; each cross-checks against its registered-voter turnout %). NUMERATOR is recoverable for only ONE election: 2024 presidential = 434,108 (100% precincts, the page-labeled 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' posted 10 a.m. Wed Nov 6, captured 2:41 PM Nov 6 before the 4 p.m. canvass resume), giving 56.24% -- PRIMARY. The other five have no archived election-night plateau: 2012/2014/2016/2018 used a JS-iframe results page (www.sbcounty.gov/rov/elections/Results/<date>/) whose dynamic iframe data was never crawled at an election-night timestamp -- only post-canvass captures survive (2014 Fri Nov 7 = 280,105/95.5% of final; 2016 Fri Nov 18; 2018 Mon Nov 12 = 365,083/66.9% of final). 2022 (post-epollbook) is the most frustrating: the archived posting schedule pins the 'Final Unofficial Election Night Results' to 9:40 a.m. Wed Nov 9, but Wayback only captured the 4 a.m. intermediate posting (177,481 at 49.37% precincts -- a mid-count undercount) and post-canvass, never the 9:40am-4pm plateau window. So a clean pre/post-e-pollbook election-night comparison CANNOT be made for San Bernardino from archived first-report data -- only the single post-e-pollbook 2024 value (56.24%) is sourceable, and no pre-e-pollbook value is. (Method note: WebFetch is blocked for web.archive.org but curl/CDX --noproxy and the headless-Chrome render_wayback puppeteer helper reach it; San Bernardino self-hosts a Clarity-style results viewer on results.rov.sbcounty.gov, surfaced via sbcountyelections.com pre-2024 and elections.sbcounty.gov in 2024, with downloadable ElectionSummaryReportRPT.pdf/.xlsx from 2019 onward.)
